auth.label: API Key
auth.description: UptimeRobot main or read-only API key sent in the legacy API request body. Create it from Integrations & API in your UptimeRobot dashboard.

actions.name: create_monitor
actions.description: Create a new monitor in the connected UptimeRobot account.

friendly_name.description: The friendly name of the monitor.

url.description: The URL, hostname, or IP address that UptimeRobot should monitor.

type.description: The UptimeRobot monitor type code. Known values are 1=HTTP(s), 2=Keyword, 3=Ping, 4=Port, 5=Heartbeat, and 6=SSL.

sub_type.description: The subtype code used for port monitors. Known values are 1=HTTP, 2=HTTPS, 3=FTP, 4=SMTP, 5=POP3, 6=IMAP, and 99=Custom.

port.description: The destination port used for custom port monitors.

interval.description: The monitor interval in seconds accepted by UptimeRobot.

timeout.description: The timeout in seconds before UptimeRobot treats the check as failed.

keyword_type.description: The keyword matching mode. Use 1 when the keyword must exist, or 2 when it must not exist.

keyword_value.description: The keyword value used by keyword monitors.

http_username.description: The HTTP authentication username used by the monitor.

http_password.description: The HTTP authentication password used by the monitor.

ssl.description: Whether SSL validation should stay enabled for HTTPS-based monitors.

anyOf.description: The official alert_contacts string, such as 12345_0_0-67890_5_2.
The numeric ID of the UptimeRobot alert contact.

id.description: The numeric ID of the UptimeRobot alert contact.

threshold.description: How many minutes UptimeRobot should wait before notifying this alert contact.

recurrence.description: How many times UptimeRobot should repeat the notification for this alert contact.

anyOf.description: A list of alert contacts to encode into the official alert_contacts parameter.

alert_contacts.description: Either the official alert_contacts string or a list of structured alert contact assignments.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a UptimeRobot monitor.

id.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

friendly_name.description: The friendly name configured for the monitor.

url.description: The monitored URL, hostname, or IP address.

type.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

status.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

sub_type.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

interval.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

timeout.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

keyword_type.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

keyword_value.description: The keyword value configured for keyword monitors, when present.

http_username.description: The HTTP authentication username configured for the monitor, when present.

http_password.description: The HTTP authentication password configured for the monitor, when present.

id.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

friendly_name.description: The friendly name of the alert contact.

type.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

status.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

value.description: The destination value configured for the alert contact.

items.description: An alert contact returned by the UptimeRobot API.

alert_contacts.description: The alert contacts returned for the monitor, when requested.

type.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

datetime.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

duration.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

reason.description: The nested reason object returned by UptimeRobot, when present.

items.description: A monitor log entry returned by UptimeRobot.

logs.description: The monitor logs returned by UptimeRobot, when requested.

create_datetime.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

monitor.description: A monitor returned by the UptimeRobot API.

actions.name: delete_monitor
actions.description: Delete a monitor from the connected UptimeRobot account.

monitor_id.description: The numeric ID of the UptimeRobot monitor.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a UptimeRobot monitor.

deleted.description: Whether the monitor was deleted successfully.

outputSchema.description: The monitor deletion acknowledgement returned by the UptimeRobot provider.

actions.name: get_account_details
actions.description: Get account-level monitor usage and profile details from the connected UptimeRobot account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting UptimeRobot account details.

email.description: The email address of the connected UptimeRobot account.

user_id.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

monitor_limit.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

monitor_interval.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

up_monitors.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

down_monitors.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

paused_monitors.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

firstname.description: The first name of the account owner, when present.

registered_at.description: The account registration timestamp returned by UptimeRobot, when present.

account.description: The account details returned by the UptimeRobot API.

outputSchema.description: The UptimeRobot account details lookup result.

actions.name: get_monitor
actions.description: Get the full configuration and current status of a single UptimeRobot monitor.

monitor_id.description: The numeric ID of the UptimeRobot monitor.

logs.description: Whether monitor logs should be included in the UptimeRobot response.

alert_contacts.description: Whether alert contacts should be included in the UptimeRobot response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching a single UptimeRobot monitor.

id.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

friendly_name.description: The friendly name configured for the monitor.

url.description: The monitored URL, hostname, or IP address.

type.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

status.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

sub_type.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

interval.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

timeout.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

keyword_type.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

keyword_value.description: The keyword value configured for keyword monitors, when present.

http_username.description: The HTTP authentication username configured for the monitor, when present.

http_password.description: The HTTP authentication password configured for the monitor, when present.

id.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

friendly_name.description: The friendly name of the alert contact.

type.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

status.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

value.description: The destination value configured for the alert contact.

items.description: An alert contact returned by the UptimeRobot API.

alert_contacts.description: The alert contacts returned for the monitor, when requested.

type.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

datetime.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

duration.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

reason.description: The nested reason object returned by UptimeRobot, when present.

items.description: A monitor log entry returned by UptimeRobot.

logs.description: The monitor logs returned by UptimeRobot, when requested.

create_datetime.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

monitor.description: A monitor returned by the UptimeRobot API.

outputSchema.description: The single-monitor lookup result returned by UptimeRobot.

actions.name: list_alert_contacts
actions.description: List the alert contacts configured in the connected UptimeRobot account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing UptimeRobot alert contacts.

id.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

friendly_name.description: The friendly name of the alert contact.

type.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

status.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

value.description: The destination value configured for the alert contact.

items.description: An alert contact returned by the UptimeRobot API.

alert_contacts.description: The alert contacts returned by UptimeRobot.

offset.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

limit.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

total.description: A numeric value returned by the UptimeRobot API.

anyOf.description: The pagination summary returned by UptimeRobot.

outputSchema.description: The alert contact list returned by UptimeRobot.

actions.name: list_monitors
actions.description: List monitors available in the connected UptimeRobot account.

offset.description: The zero-based pagination offset to request from UptimeRobot.

limit.description: The maximum number of monitors to return from UptimeRobot.

search.description: A search term applied to monitor friendly names, URLs, and types.

sort.description: The field used by UptimeRobot to sort the monitor list.

items.description: The numeric ID of the UptimeRobot monitor.

monitor_ids.description: A list of monitor IDs encoded into the official monitors filter.

items.description: The UptimeRobot monitor type code. Known values are 1=HTTP(s), 2=Keyword, 3=Ping, 4=Port, 5=Heartbeat, and 6=SSL.

types.description: A list of monitor type codes encoded into the official types filter.

statuses.description: A list of monitor status codes encoded into the official statuses filter.

logs.description: Whether monitor logs should be included in each monitor result.

alert_contacts.description: Whether alert contacts should be included in each monitor result.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing monitors from the UptimeRobot account.
